user.title: Add a LOGO! PLC
user.description: Connection details for one Siemens LOGO! over Modbus TCP.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the PLC. Check the host, port and that Modbus TCP is enabled.

add.title: What is it?
add.description: Pick what the output is. Lights and fans get proper light/fan controls and icons.

control.title: How is it controlled?
control.description: Impulse pulses a coil (impulse relay). Latching holds a coil at a level. Simple holds a coil without reading the output back.

entity_form.title: Entity settings
entity_form.description: State is the output coil to read (pick the Q). Pulse/Write is the network-input coil that drives it.

edit_yaml.title: Edit all as YAML
edit_yaml.description: The full list of entities as YAML. Each item needs a domain (light/fan/switch/binary_sensor/button), a control mode for controllable ones, and its address fields.

error.invalid_entities: Could not read the entities. Check that each has a valid domain, control mode and the required address fields.
